## BuiltIn.BuiltInData.getMoldsDirectory() method

Gets the molds directory from the built-in library tree.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static getMoldsDirectory(): Result<FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem>;
```
**Returns:**

Result&lt;FileTree.IFileTreeDirectoryItem&gt;

`Success` with the molds directory, or `Failure` if not found.
